description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Builds that triggers on push events with tags matching a version pattern. The workflow should run on a Windows 2019 environment with a matrix strategy for 32-bit and 64-bit architectures. It should check out the repository, set up the environment, download and install dependencies, build the project, and create an installer. The workflow should also sign the executable and installer, and upload the installer as a release asset and to a Google Cloud Storage bucket.
